text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the mini concert! When I arrive
at the venue, the four performers are already
there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Our support has arrived! Hehe.
Tell me, did you volunteer to help with the
concert for the chance to see me backstage?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's clearly not the case.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll d-do my best and try not to s-step on
anyone's feet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Relax, Doto. The concert's going to be great
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They begin their rehearsal. All of Narita Top
Road's practice seems to be paying off up until—

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I didn't mean to hit my hand against the
set piece!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this stage is a bit smaller than we hoped
for. Sorry, can you adjust your choreography a
little and keep your movements tighter?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: (Spin in place, spin in place—agh!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pow!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
Let's change this part up a little. Top Road,
instead of dancing with everyone, we'll have you
sing a solo here!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry about these last-minute changes. We'll
do our best to adjust the staging to make the
most of the performance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sorry. I should be adapting to the changes
better...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going back to training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, that's a vote of confidence from Ayabe. It's
as though to say we needn't squander time
worrying for Top Road—she'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-right! Top Road always comes through!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Oh, our dear rival, Narita Top Road! I,
the Overlord, vouch for your skill! She will surely
be transformed by the time of dawn's arrival!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Director! Can you give me until tomorrow? I
promise I'll master the choreography by then!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: One! Two! One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... One more time! I'm going to keep going until I get it right!
choice_data_list: Take it slowly. You don't want to rush this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The choreography isn't new to her. She just needs
to remember all the effort she's put in up till now.
choice_data_list: You've put in the work, so draw upon it now!
You've put in the work, so draw upon it now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Draw upon the work I've put in?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(That's right... I'm not learning this dance for the
first time. I already know how it goes!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
(I've poured so much of myself into this so I can
meet everyone's expectations!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're a hundred percent right. All the work I've
done wasn't for nothing. I won't waste the efforts
I've made!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
First, I have to get a grasp on what I'm dealing
with, then I have to analyze the situation!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I just have to stay calm and tackle the issues I'm
having. I'm going to review the recording of our
rehearsal!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Aaand there! Huff... Huff... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
This will definitely convince the director I'm ready
too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Right now, I feel like I can do anything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Like, for instance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the next day, just before the concert. The
time for Narita Top Road to show off the fruits of
her labor has come!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
What?! Top Road... Are you sure you want to do
both?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm positive! Here, let me show you that I can! Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Accelerating now! ♪ Never backing down! There's
a place I'm meant to be! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! She's singing and dancing at the same
time?! Her voice is so strong and stable too!

text_block_list.name: Stage Director
text_block_list.text:
Magnificent! I'm shocked! Yes, go ahead and sing
and dance simultaneously on stage! The audience
will love it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Thank you so much! I'll do all I can to wow the
crowd!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though fear may rob you of all hope, through the
dark forest and beyond our expectations shall
you go... Yes! Ahh, how brilliant!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer. Because of you, I
was able to believe in myself and do my best!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Hehe! Is that supposed to be an imitation
of what I said when we were helping my
classmates with their makeup test?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's time to do this. We'll show you what
we're really made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road flashes me a sparkling smile
before she heads on stage.
